allow: Bash(npm install @supabase/supabase-js react-router-dom recharts date-fns lucide-react)

Bash(node -e "const ts = require\(''typescript''\); const config = ts.readConfigFile\(''tsconfig.app.json'', ts.sys.readFile\); const parsed = ts.parseJsonConfigFileContent\(config.config, ts.sys, ''.''\); const program = ts.createProgram\(parsed.fileNames, parsed.options\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(program\); diags.forEach\(d => { const msg = ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, ''\\n''\); if \(d.file\) { const {line} = d.file.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition\(d.start\); console.log\(d.file.fileName + '':'' + \(line+1\) + '' '' + msg\); } else { console.log\(msg\); } }\); console.log\(''Total errors: '' + diags.length\);")
Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\(''child_process''\); try { execSync\(''npx tsc --noEmit'', {stdio: ''inherit'', timeout: 60000}\); } catch\(e\) { process.exit\(e.status\); }")
